my_thoughts: They asked 'how shall my brother cease to be angry?' Wrong question. They can't control the brother's emotion—that's external, not in their power. I'm refusing ('I have nothing to say to you about his anger') and redirecting: what can YOU control? They'll reframe ('how shall I maintain myself in a state conformable to nature?')—that's the right question.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student asked 'how shall my brother cease to be angry?' Wrong question. They can't control the brother's emotion—that's external, not in their power. I'm refusing ('I have nothing to say to you about his anger') and redirecting: what can YOU control? They'll reframe.
visible_response: Bring him to me and I will tell him. But I have nothing to say to you about his anger.
